description: These slip-on sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the cutouts and applique work. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear. Team these with dresses, and jeans and tops.UpperSynthetic leather uppers covering the forefoot and midfootStitch detailing, cut outs and applique work for added style and reinforcementElasticated insert on the front for snug FitCushioned footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
